provenance.subject: Science
provenance.chapterTitle: Mindful Eating: A Journey to Health

questions.text: Which nutrient is the main source of energy for our body?
questions.explanation: Carbohydrates are the body's primary source of energy. They are broken down into glucose which fuels cellular activities.

questions.text: Deficiency of Vitamin C causes scurvy.
questions.explanation: Vitamin C deficiency leads to scurvy, characterized by bleeding gums, weakness, and joint pain. Citrus fruits are rich in Vitamin C.

questions.text: Why should we include roughage (dietary fiber) in our diet?
questions.correctAnswer: Roughage helps in proper digestion and prevents constipation by adding bulk to food.
questions.explanation: Dietary fiber adds bulk to food, helps move it through the digestive system, and prevents constipation. It is found in whole grains, fruits, and vegetables.

questions.text: Foods rich in proteins help in ________ and repair of body tissues.
questions.explanation: Proteins are essential for the growth, development, and repair of body tissues. They are often called 'body-building foods'.
